{{CargoOrgan
|name=Domain Hub
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10839
|idx=44
|description=The work of eight Demon Gods, it has a command system capable of dispatching hundreds of millions of troops at the same time, and a tactical algorithm function that can foresee the future.
|skill=
|hp=1736
|def=122
|atk=97
|rush=239
|gene1=Gain 2x Rewards when watching an Ad by +20%
|gene2=Domain Cabin Output +5%
|gene3=Gain 2x Rewards when watching an Ad by +20%
|gene4=When fusing blue proteins in Cell Furnace, 1% chance to convert to purple
|gene7=Domain Cabin Output +10% (Awakened)
|}}
